events.text: Goal!  Argentina 1, France 0. Lionel Messi (Argentina) converts the penalty with a left footed shot to the bottom right corner.
Goal!  Argentina 2, France 0. Ángel Di María (Argentina) left footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Alexis Mac Allister   following a fast break.
Enzo Fernández (Argentina) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Adrien Rabiot (France) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal!  Argentina 2, France 1. Kylian Mbappé (France) converts the penalty with a right footed shot to the bottom left corner.
Goal!  Argentina 2, France 2. Kylian Mbappé (France) right footed shot from the left side of the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Marcus Thuram.
Marcus Thuram (France) is shown the yellow card.
Olivier Giroud (France) is shown the yellow card.
Marcos Acuña (Argentina) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal!  Argentina 3, France 2. Lionel Messi (Argentina) right footed shot from very close range to the centre of the goal.
Leandro Paredes (Argentina) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Gonzalo Montiel (Argentina) is shown the yellow card for hand ball.
Goal!  Argentina 3, France 3. Kylian Mbappé (France) converts the penalty with a right footed shot to the bottom left corner.
Emiliano Martínez (Argentina) is shown the yellow card.
